citation.description: test_no_src_module_over_the_hard_cap asserts no .py file over the limit read from .github/module-size-limit.txt (=800); allowlist file confirmed absent from .github/

criteria.criterion: .github/module-size-allowlist.txt no longer exists (or is empty) and no src/rebar/**/*.py file exceeds 800 LOC

citation.description: test_allowlist_mechanism_removed asserts neither .github/module-size-allowlist.txt nor .github/module-size-ceilings.txt exists; CI gate in test.yml lines 199-240 and gerrit-verify.yaml lines 164-205 has no allowlist branch — only an absolute cap check

criteria.criterion: The allowlist/ceilings mechanism (both files + the sync contract test + the shell gate's allowlist branch) is removed; CI still fails any new over-cap file

citation.description: Architecture doc documents the lock and admin override requirement; gerrit-verify.yaml lines 184-195 and test.yml lines 219-229 implement the limit-lock by fetching main's limit and failing if it changed

criteria.criterion: A hard gate blocks changing the 800 limit through the normal contribution process (admin manual override required); documented

citation.description: Ticket comment (Joe Oakhart, 2026-07-19T01:20Z) names 15 specific Gerrit change numbers (#790–#808), URLs (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/<n>), and explains that MERGED status requires LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1 per the submit-requirement. Codebase corroboration: the resulting state (allowlist deleted, gate+test live) is fully consistent with all changes having landed.

criteria.criterion: Every child story landed on main via Gerrit (LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1)
